_meta.purpose: Wave-2 expansion of the open-settlement catalog: full sweep of classaction.org/settlements + openclassactions.com on 2026-06-10. Complements (does not replace) open-settlements-2026-06.json wave-1. Filtered for relevance to the 10M-person credit.com/Lexington Law population. Excluded: employment/wage-hour classes, WA job-posting cases, single-employer ERISA, hyper-local property cases.
_meta.verification: Entries marked verified:false carry aggregator-reported terms only; verify deadline/fund/eligibility on administrator site before outreach.

tiers.1: field-provable from credit data (creditor + account type + date window)
tiers.2: proxy + attestation (relationship plausible from data; gating fact attested or administrator-confirmed)

high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Anyone who sent a fraud-induced money transfer via Western Union 2004-01-01 to 2020-03-31
high_value_population_plays.proofRequired: Transfer details (MTCN helps but petition possible without)

dataMapping.note: Pure population-overlap/attestation play across the full contactable base; subprime population skews toward WU usage. High per-claimant ceiling.

high_value_population_plays.settlement: Burke v. Visa — nonbank ATM access fee antitrust
high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Persons who paid an unreimbursed surcharge at a nonbank ATM in the U.S. since 2007-10-24

dataMapping.note: Near-universal class for a subprime/underbanked base (heavy nonbank-ATM users). Watch for claim window opening.

high_value_population_plays.settlement: In re RealPage Rental Software Antitrust (MDL 3071) — partial settlements
high_value_population_plays.deadline: pending — claim window not yet open
high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Renters of multifamily housing priced via RealPage revenue-management software

dataMapping.note: Renters = majority of the credit-repair base; addresses in file can be matched to RealPage-managed properties when class lists publish. Register for monitoring now.

high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: SunTrust deposit customers charged challenged overdraft fees

dataMapping.note: Deposit accounts not in tradelines; proxy = SunTrust/Truist credit relationships + geographic footprint (Southeast). Monitor for claim window.
Frictionless/automatic; relevant as no-action recovery messaging for the base.

high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Google Home/Nest/Pixel device owners and Assistant users

dataMapping.note: Broad-population attestation play.

high_value_population_plays.defendant: National Association of Realtors / RE/MAX / Keller Williams / Anywhere
high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Home sellers who listed on an MLS and paid buyer-broker commission (aggregators conflict on buyer vs seller — verify)
high_value_population_plays.proofRequired: Sale records help; class lists from MLS data

dataMapping.note: Mortgage tradelines + closed dates identify home-sale events in window. Verify class side (seller) and covered MLSs before sizing.

high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Airline loyalty-program members affected by devaluation practices

dataMapping.note: Broad population; airline co-brand card tradelines (Citi/Barclays/Chase co-brands) are a Tier-1 proxy for membership.
Broad-population play.

high_value_population_plays.perClaimant: Varies; no proof required for base tier
high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: Persons who bought beef for personal consumption 2014-08 to 2019-12

dataMapping.note: Universal-population attestation claim; 6/30 deadline is close — good immediate outreach item.
Large diabetic population overlap; attestation.

high_value_population_plays.classDefinition: California Tinder Plus/Gold subscribers age 29+ charged higher prices 2015-2019

dataMapping.note: CA subset of base, age 29+ — demographable from identity data + attestation.

banking_credit_lending.classDefinition: Wisconsin consumers who received BMO repossession notices 2021-2026

dataMapping.note: BMO/Bank of the West auto tradelines + WI address + repo/charge-off status flags. Direct field match — size cohort now; deadline 1 week.

banking_credit_lending.classDefinition: Florida residents contacted about Sarasota Memorial debts 2017-06 to 2026-05

dataMapping.note: Medical-collection tradelines naming Sarasota Memorial / its collectors + FL address.

banking_credit_lending.classDefinition: Equity Bank customers in KS/MO/AR/OK charged challenged OD/NSF fees

dataMapping.note: Automatic payment; informational.
Automatic; KY footprint.
Small fund; HSBC relationship proxy. Same theory as Capital One 360 — savings-rate two-tiering.
Small regional; low priority.
Attestation; younger subset of base.

dataMapping.note: Hyundai Capital/Kia Finance tradelines (measured cohorts ~44K/54K LEX) + model-year window. Long runway — pipeline case alongside the theft settlement.

Mercedes-Benz Financial tradelines + vintage.
Nissan Motor Acceptance tradelines (304 PACER cases indexed) + vintage; repair docs from claimant.
Ford Motor Credit tradelines (437 PACER cases indexed) + model/vintage.

privacy_tcpa_facta.note: Prerecorded calls; voucher only — low priority.

ftc_redress.deadline: many paid automatically (2025-11 onward); claims process open 180 days for others (per FTC) — wave-1 listed 2026-07-27

dataMapping.note: Universal-population play; email base outreach. Largest FTC redress ever.

ftc_redress.classDefinition: Players charged for unwanted items 2017-2022, parents of minors with unauthorized card charges 2017-2018, accounts locked after disputes
